title: Ores To The Nether
description: Adding vanilla ore fragments to the Nether, mine in the Nether now!
body:
This mod adds vanilla ores such as emerald and diamond in the nether! They have the same format as gold nuggets, but give less ressources.

The goal is to make the Nether more attractive than just a go-in and out after some blaze rods.

**Please note**

This mod is still under development, new ores may be added in the future!
